entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma, mazungumzo ya mada, njia za kujifunza, miongozo ya blogu, na kurasa za msaada zimeundwa ziwe rahisi kupatikana na kushirikiwa.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Anza kujifunza

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Kurasa za kujifunza za umma ziko wazi, huku njia za API, njia za msimamizi, michakato ya kuweka upya, na kurasa binafsi za huduma zikibaki zimezuiwa.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Kila hali ya kujifunza ina kiungo cha umma ili wanafunzi waanze moja kwa moja ndani ya uzoefu sahihi wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Tumia hii unaporejelea mipaka ya umma na binafsi, usalama wa mwanafunzi, na uaminifu wa shule.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: Faharasa ya maudhui ya AI

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Tofauti na chatbot ya kawaida, inspir hupanga AI kuzunguka hali za kujifunza ili wanafunzi waanze na aina ya msaada wanaohitaji: vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, ukumbukaji amilifu, uigizaji wa nafasi, mjadala, au maoni.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Utekelezaji shuleni unaweza kubadilishwa kulingana na maudhui maalum, mitiririko ya kazi, vidokezo, na mahitaji ya kujifunza yanayolingana na NCERT pale inapofaa.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Tabia ya kujifunza huja kwanza

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Hali za wageni za umma humpa yeyote mahali pa manufaa pa kuanzia, huku utekelezaji katika shule na kwa washirika ukiweza kubadilisha uzoefu kwa mahitaji ya eneo husika.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Kila hali kuu ya kujifunza ina mahali pa kuanzia kwa wageni wa umma ili watu waanze kutoka utafutaji, mitandao ya kijamii, au kiungo kilichoshirikiwa.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Je, uzinduzi unaweza kuanza kwa kiwango kidogo?

entries.source: A clear explanation of guest mode, private chats, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Maelezo wazi ya hali ya mgeni, mazungumzo binafsi, usalama wa mwanafunzi, na uaminifu wa shule.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Tamko la umma kuhusu kwa nini inspir ipo na maana ya upatikanaji wa kujifunza.

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: Zaidi ya wanafunzi milioni 1

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Lengo si kuwafanya watu wawe wapokeaji tu mbele ya AI. Lengo ni kumpa kila mwanafunzi mahali pa kwanza penye subira pa kuuliza, kufanya mazoezi, kupata mrejesho, kujaribu tena, na kujenga ujasiri.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Mitindo ya umma imeundwa kuzunguka tabia za kujifunza: vidokezo, maswali ya Kisokratiki, ukaguzi wa hatua, maswali mafupi, kadi za kumbukumbu, maoni kuhusu uandishi, mizunguko ya marudio, na kueleza kwa vitendo.

entries.value: Kwa nini inspir imejengwa kuzunguka hali badala ya kisanduku kimoja cha gumzo?

entries.value: Ufikiaji unaweza kufadhiliwa na shule washirika au kusaidiwa kupitia njia za udhamini wa CSR kwa jamii zinazohitaji ujifunzaji wa AI wenye ruzuku.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Bidhaa ya umma, njia ya shule, na maktaba ya maudhui vyote vinapaswa kurejea kanuni ileile: kujifunza kubaki kwa vitendo, kupatikana, na kuwa na manufaa.

entries.source: 100+ countries
entries.value: Zaidi ya nchi 100

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Kujifunza kwa ubora kunapaswa kupatikana kwa urahisi, kuhisi kwa kibinadamu, na kuwa hai.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka hali za kujifunza kama ufundishaji wa Kisokrasia, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali ya kujipima, kadi za kujifunzia, hatua za hisabati, uhakiki wa uandishi, na kupanga mitihani, ili wanafunzi waingie katika tabia ya kujifunza yenye mwelekeo zaidi.

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: Jaribu hali za wageni wa umma

entries.value: Ujenzi upya wa chanzo huria kwa watengenezaji programu, waelimishaji, na wachangiaji.

entries.source: Built since 2013
entries.value: Imejengwa tangu 2013

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Dhamira imeunganishwa na nyuso halisi za bidhaa.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir hufanya hali za kujifunza zifunguke kwenye /chat/{topicSlug}, ikiwaruhusu wanaojifunza kuingia moja kwa moja katika uzoefu sahihi wa kujifunza kwa AI bila kuhitaji gumzo binafsi lililohifadhiwa.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Bidhaa ya umma hubaki rahisi kujaribu: wanafunzi wanaweza kufika moja kwa moja kwenye hali ya kujifunza na kuanza kama wageni. Shule na washirika wa CSR wanaweza kusaidia utekelezaji ulioboreshwa pale jamii zinapohitaji usiri, ulinganishaji na mtaala, au ufikiaji unaoruzukiwa.

entries.source: Website
entries.value: Tovuti

entries.value: Blogu ya umma ina zaidi ya miongozo 100, mizunguko ya maagizo, na makundi makuu yaliyounganishwa na hali hai za kujifunza.

entries.source: Learning should be free, fun, useful, and available to anyone with curiosity.
entries.value: Kujifunza kunapaswa kuwa bure, kufurahisha, kuwa na manufaa, na kupatikana kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir ipo ili kufanya kujifunza kufikiwe, kushirikishe, kufurahisha, na kuwa na manufaa kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi kupitia zana za bure za umma za kujifunza kwa AI na nafasi za kujifunza zilizo tayari kwa shule.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutathmini hali za umma kwanza, kisha kujadili mitiririko maalum ya kazi, mipango ya usiri, mahitaji ya maudhui, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: AI learning access can be funded by partner schools or supported through CSR sponsorship for communities that need subsidised access.
entries.value: Ufikiaji wa ujifunzaji kwa AI unaweza kufadhiliwa na shule washirika au kusaidiwa kupitia udhamini wa CSR kwa jamii zinazohitaji ufikiaji wenye ruzuku.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: Bidhaa inapaswa kufundisha, si kujibu tu.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Hadithi hiyo inajumuisha maswali mafupi, mitandao ya shule nje ya mtandao, uingizaji wa mitaala, na mitindo ya umma ya kujifunza kwa AI.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni jukwaa la bure la kujifunza kwa AI lenye hali za umma kwa wageni kwa ajili ya maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokrasia, ukufunzi wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali ya kujipima, kadi za kujifunzia, mijadala, uigizaji wa nafasi, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.value: Ilianza kama maswali ya umma na jumuiya za wanafunzi mwaka 2013.

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Kanuni

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kufungua Jifunze Chochote, Ufundishaji wa Kisokratiki, Msaidizi wa Kazi za Nyumbani, Msaidizi wa Hatua za Hisabati, majaribio mafupi au kadi za kujikumbusha moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni kutoka kwenye orodha ya umma ya njia za kujifunza.

entries.source: From Facebook quizzes and offline events to applied AI learning infrastructure.
entries.value: Kutoka kuizi za Facebook na matukio ya nje ya mtandao hadi miundombinu ya kujifunza kwa AI inayotumika.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Mtazamo wenye nguvu zaidi ni kujifunza kwa AI kwa umma bila malipo, kunakofunguka moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni na kuwaweka wanafunzi katika vitendo kupitia ufundishaji mahususi kwa kila hali badala ya utoaji wa majibu ya jumla.

entries.source: Why are public learning pages easy to share?
entries.value: Kwa nini kurasa za umma za kujifunza ni rahisi kushirikiwa?

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: Maktaba ya kujifunza kwa maandishi inayosaidia vidokezo, mizunguko ya kusoma, na mazoezi ya kina zaidi.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka vidokezo, maswali, maswali ya kujipima, kadi za kujifunzia, mijadala, mapitio, na maelezo badala ya kunakili majibu tu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: Default guest tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi chaguomsingi wa mgeni

entries.source: What is the most useful product angle for coverage?
entries.value: Mtazamo wa bidhaa wenye manufaa zaidi kwa matangazo ni upi?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji miundo tofauti ya mwingiliano, kwa hiyo inspir hutumia ufundishaji amilifu unaolingana na kila hali. Kidokezo cha kazi ya nyumbani, swali la Kisokrasia, uigaji wa kihistoria, mapitio ya kadi za kujikumbusha, na uhakiki wa uandishi havipaswi kutenda kama gumzo moja la jumla.

entries.source: Mission | inspir
entries.value: Dhamira | inspir

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kujaribu hali za wageni za umma kwanza, kisha kutumia ukurasa wa shule kuchunguza mitiririko maalum ya kazi, mipango ya usiri, chaguo zinazolingana na NCERT, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Walimu na viongozi wanaweza kuanza na Jifunze Chochote, Ufundishaji wa Kisokratiki, Msaidizi wa Kazi za Nyumbani, majaribio mafupi na kadi za kujikumbusha kabla ya uzinduzi rasmi.

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti zinahitaji hali tofauti: maswali ya Kisokrasia, vidokezo vya kazi ya nyumbani, kadi za kujikumbusha, mdahalo, maigizo ya historia, uhakiki wa uandishi, na zaidi.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Vianzio vya mada vya umma kama /chat/learn-anything na /chat/socratic-instruction ni kurasa wazi za kujifunza ambazo mtu yeyote anaweza kujaribu.

entries.source: inspir mission principles
entries.value: kanuni za dhamira ya inspir

entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Mwenza mwenye uwezo wa kujifunza hapaswi kutegemea eneo, kipato cha familia, au kama mwanafunzi tayari anamjua mtu sahihi wa kumuuliza.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Dhamira ya inspir ni kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kwa kila mtu kupitia zana za bure za umma za kujifunza kwa AI.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.

entries.value: Dhamira ya inspir ni nini?

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: Kila hali ya umma ni mlango wa kuingia katika mwenendo tofauti wa kujifunza, ili muundo ulingane na kazi badala ya kumlazimisha kila mwanafunzi kwenye kisanduku kimoja cha jumla cha gumzo.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Bidhaa ya umma humpa kila mtu mahali pa kuanzia, huku utekelezaji wa shule na washirika ukiweza kubadili uzoefu kulingana na mahitaji ya eneo husika.

entries.value: Vianzio vya hali ya mgeni

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Saidia ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa wa kujifunza kwa AI kwa jamii zinazohitaji msaada wa ubora wa juu bila kuongeza gharama kwa familia.

entries.value: Fahirisi kamili ya marejeleo ya umma

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Jukwaa lilifanya kazi ya kuingiza mitaala, urejeshaji wa taarifa, mitiririko ya kujifunza yenye muundo, na uzoefu wa awali wa ufundishaji kwa AI.

entries.source: More than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters for AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: Zaidi ya miongozo 100, mizunguko ya prompti, na makundi makuu ya kujifunza kwa msaada wa AI.

entries.source: Founded

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: Jukwaa limeundwa kuwasaidia watu kufikiri kwa hoja, kufanya mazoezi, kukumbuka, na kueleza mawazo kwa maneno yao badala ya kukusanya majibu yaliyokamilika.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa binafsi una manufaa makubwa, lakini haujasambazwa kwa usawa. inspir hutumia AI kupanua ufikiaji huku ikimweka mwanafunzi akishiriki kikamilifu: vidokezo kabla ya majibu, maswali kabla ya mihadhara, na mazoezi baada ya maelezo.

entries.source: Schools and partners

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Jamii ya wanafunzi ambayo tayari imeenea zaidi ya India hadi kwa hadhira pana ya kimataifa.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir hupanga AI kuzunguka tabia za kujifunza kwa vitendo: vidokezo, maswali, maswali ya kujipima, kadi za kujifunzia, uhakiki, na mapitio.

entries.source: Deccan Business coverage
entries.value: Habari za Deccan Business

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za wageni wa umma huwawezesha viongozi wa shule na walimu kujaribu uzoefu wa kujifunza kabla ya kujadili utekelezaji maalum wa shule.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Tathmini kwanza tabaka la umma la kujifunza kwa AI, kisha chunguza mtiririko maalum wa kazi, mahitaji ya usiri, ulinganifu wa maudhui, na ufadhili wa matumizi.

entries.source: Primary audience

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: Kazi tofauti za kujifunza zinahitaji miundo tofauti: maswali ya Kisokrasia, vidokezo vya kazi ya nyumbani, kadi za kujikumbusha, mdahalo, maigizo ya historia, uhakiki wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.value: Masharti rasmi yanayohusu matumizi yanayokubalika, majukumu ya akaunti, na masharti ya huduma.

entries.source: The goal is to help people find the right public learning page quickly. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open; API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay closed.
entries.value: Lengo ni kuwasaidia watu kupata haraka ukurasa sahihi wa umma wa kujifunza. Njia za umma, miongozo, na vitovu vya kujifunza viko wazi; njia za API, msimamizi, kuweka upya, na zana binafsi zinabaki zimefungwa.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir ilianza mwaka 2013 kama jumuiya ya umma ya maswali ya kujipima na kujifunza, ikakua kupitia shule na mitandao ya wanafunzi, na baadaye ikaendeleza miundombinu ya kujifunza kwa AI na uzoefu wa umma wa ufundishaji kwa AI.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir ipo ili kufanya kujifunza kufikiwe, kushirikishe, kufurahisha, na kuwa na manufaa kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi, awe mwanafunzi, mzazi, mwalimu, au anayejifunza mwenyewe.
